text:
Here's my conversation with Jensen Huang, CEO of NVIDIA, the most valuable & one of the most influential companies in the history of human civilization. It is the engine powering the AI revolution.

This was a fascinating & inspiring conversation, in parts super-technical on https://t.co/RJ6aOgHY4O

Here's the links for my conversation with Jensen Huang, CEO of NVIDIA:

YouTube: https://t.co/cC5nUizEwd

Spotify: https://t.co/VjTdb68WX7

Podcast: https://t.co/uxqXcfXs8M https://t.co/SUZwbkf7aI

Agent Skills 设计哲学和实战进化

前半段是真实场景演示，看我日常怎么用 Agent + Skills 完成实际工作；后半段是设计哲学和迭代方法论，把踩过的坑和悟出来的经验都讲透。

四个核心观点：

1）从提示词到 Skills：起步没有门槛。把你已有的好用提示词、好的实践、甚至模糊的想法，直接用 https://t.co/xcPJnYclvw
有稀缺性的 SaaS 就是没法用 Vibe Coding 做出来的、又能解决实际问题的

Every AI company right now is racing to write code faster. 

But the problem nobody's solving is what happens after the code gets written.

> We deploy agents that process thousands of transactions a week inside Fortune 5000 finance departments and supply chains.

> When
RT @godofprompt: if you’re running your own thing, how big is it?

This is what AI-native engineering infrastructure looks like.

Not a copilot. A world model that learns your codebase over time and compounds knowledge across every incident, PR, and deployment.
RT @icreatelife: QT a chibi version of you 🥹🫶✨ https://t.co/vWse3MfKWH

For those using OpenClaw at a high level, what’s your favorite default model? I was using Nemotron 3-super locally on my Spark but it hits context limits too quickly. I’m mostly using Sonnet-4.6 now but API costs rack up fast. I love my claw but honestly haven’t optimized models

I have loved being on the Helion board; I continue to be extremely excited about a future with abundant energy and Helion in particular.

As Helion and OpenAI start to explore working together at significant scale, it is difficult for me to be on both boards. (I will have a

RT @shao__meng: 信息卡制作完整方法我做成了 Skill「infocard-skills」，开源在这里了：
https://t.co/jCrTwUBZLx

支持 16/9、4/3、1/1、3/4、9/16 几种常见比例信息卡，和 2.35/1、3/1 等常见比例…

GPT-5.4 Pro continues to be the only model of its class. For anything really hard & complex, I throw it into the maw with every bit of context I can think of. More often than not, something very useful comes out.

I can't get the same results from Codex or Code or anything else.

If you are doing complicated academic work, there just isn't anything else that is a substitute right now. It would  be cool if Gemini 3.1 Deep Think was competitive, but it isnt because the harness does a really bad job with tools and references, even though the model seems good

The comfortable middle is over for software.

Growth has stalled but true profitability still hasn't arrived — most of the sector is stuck: too slow for a premium growth multiple, too diluted for a fortress multiple.

a16z's David George says CEOs have 12-18 months to pick https://t.co/7rugJYBAlK

"We look for people that are students of history, that have studied the markets and all prior attempts."
